name: Low-Fat Tuna Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the tuna and yogurt.
2. Add the shredded carrots, diced celery, and diced purple onion to the bowl.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Serve in a whole wheat pita pocket with lettuce, tomato slices, and sprouts.
